Rosslyn Data Technologies ( (GB:RDT) ) has issued an update.

Rosslyn Data Technologies has confirmed that, as of 31 March 2026, the company has 81,386,425 ordinary shares in issue, each carrying one voting right, and holds no shares in treasury. The total voting rights figure provides shareholders with the reference point needed to assess and report any changes in their holdings under the UK’s Disclosure and Transparency Rules, clarifying the company’s current capital and voting structure for investors.

data.title: Hostelworld Awards Long-Term Nil-Cost Share Options to Top Executives
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Hostelworld ( (GB:HSW) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Hostelworld has granted nil-cost share options under its Long-Term Incentive Plan to its top executives, awarding 698,007 options to Chief Executive Officer Gary Morrison and 407,611 options to Chief Financial Officer Caroline Sherry. The options, which require no upfront payment, are scheduled to vest in three years subject to continued employment and performance conditions, reinforcing management’s alignment with shareholder interests through performance-linked equity incentives.

The awards form part of Hostelworld’s regular executive compensation framework and were executed outside a trading venue, in compliance with UK and EU market abuse regulations governing transactions by persons discharging managerial responsibilities. By tying a significant portion of leadership remuneration to long-term share performance, the company underscores its focus on incentivising sustainable value creation, potentially affecting future dilution but signalling confidence in the executives’ ability to drive growth.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:HSW) stock is a Hold with a £106.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Hostelworld stock, see the GB:HSW Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on HSW Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HSW is a Neutral.

The score is primarily supported by improved profitability and strong recent cash generation, indicating a healthier business than in 2020–2022. This is tempered by a clearly bearish technical setup (price below key moving averages with weak momentum) and mixed valuation (P/E ~25.9 with a modest ~0.74% dividend yield).

To see Spark’s full report on HSW stock, click here.

More about Hostelworld

Hostelworld Group plc operates an online travel and accommodation platform focused on hostel bookings worldwide. The company serves budget-conscious and youth travelers by aggregating hostel options and related services, positioning itself as a specialist player in the low-cost, social travel segment of the wider online travel market.

data.title: Weir Group CFO Puffer Receives Vested Share Awards and Sells Portion to Cover Tax
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Weir Group plc (The) ( (GB:WEIR) ) is now available.

The Weir Group PLC has disclosed a routine management share transaction involving Chief Financial Officer Brian Puffer under its Share Reward Plan. The restricted share awards, originally granted in 2024 to compensate him for forfeited incentives on leaving bp plc, vested on 31 March 2026 and were released along with additional dividend equivalent shares.

Following the vesting, Puffer received a total of 4,884 ordinary shares, of which 2,302 were automatically sold on the London Stock Exchange at £27.74 per share to cover his tax liability, leaving him with 2,582 shares acquired. The disclosure, made under Market Abuse Regulation requirements, provides transparency around executive remuneration and equity-based incentives but does not indicate any change in the company’s strategic direction or operational performance.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:WEIR) stock is a Buy with a £3500.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Weir Group plc (The) stock, see the GB:WEIR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on WEIR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WEIR is a Neutral.

The score is led by improving profitability and a constructive earnings outlook with margin expansion guidance, but is held back by elevated leverage/cash-flow consistency concerns and weak near-term technicals. Valuation also looks demanding for the current risk profile.

To see Spark’s full report on WEIR stock, click here.

More about Weir Group plc (The)

The Weir Group PLC is an engineering company that designs and manufactures equipment and solutions primarily for the global mining and minerals processing industries. The group focuses on mission-critical technologies that improve productivity and efficiency in demanding industrial environments, with its shares listed on the London Stock Exchange.

data.title: Chrysalis Investors Back Board and Strategy as All AGM Resolutions Pass
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Chrysalis Investments Limited ( (GB:CHRY) ).

Chrysalis Investments Limited reported that all resolutions at its Annual General Meeting on 31 March 2026 were duly passed, reflecting strong shareholder backing for the board and its current strategy. Chairman Andrew Haining said the board remains focused on executing the investment policy, realising assets in an orderly manner and returning capital efficiently, with a fuller operational update promised in an early May trading statement.

Shareholders approved the financial statements, reappointed KPMG as auditor, endorsed the remuneration report and backed the re-election of all directors, including Chairman Haining, despite a notable minority vote against some board members. Investors also authorised the ongoing dividend policy, new share issuance capacity and potential share buybacks, giving the board broad flexibility to manage capital structure and portfolio realisations in line with its stated return-of-capital objectives.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:CHRY) stock is a Hold with a £86.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Chrysalis Investments Limited stock, see the GB:CHRY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CHRY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CHRY is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by mixed financial performance: low leverage and a sharp 2025 profit rebound are offset by highly volatile results and weak, inconsistent cash flow. Valuation is a clear positive due to the low P/E, while technicals are a meaningful drag given the strong downtrend despite oversold readings.

To see Spark’s full report on CHRY stock, click here.

More about Chrysalis Investments Limited

Chrysalis Investments Limited is a Guernsey-based alternative investment fund focused on investing in a portfolio of growth-oriented companies, with an emphasis on orderly realisation of assets and returning capital to shareholders. The company operates under the AIFM Directive with G10 Capital Limited as its authorised alternative investment fund manager and Chrysalis Investment Partners LLP acting as its appointed representative.

data.description:

Rio Tinto ( (GB:RIO) ) has provided an update.

Rio Tinto has published a supplementary prospectus for its U.S.$10 billion Euro Medium Term Note programme, which has been approved by the UK Financial Conduct Authority. The document, relating to notes issued by Rio Tinto Finance (USA) entities and guaranteed by Rio Tinto plc and Rio Tinto Limited, updates the existing base prospectus and is now available via the London Stock Exchange and the FCA’s National Storage Mechanism.

The move underscores Rio Tinto’s continued use of international debt markets to support its financing needs and maintain flexibility in its capital structure. By refreshing documentation for the sizeable note programme, the group preserves access to a key funding channel that can support future operational, investment or refinancing requirements, which is relevant for bond investors and other capital-market stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:RIO) stock is a Hold with a £63.30 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Rio Tinto stock, see the GB:RIO Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RIO is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial performance despite mid-cycle pressures (margin compression, higher debt, and weaker FCF conversion). Technicals add support via a clear uptrend and healthy momentum. Valuation is fair with an attractive dividend, while earnings-call positives (productivity and copper growth) are tempered by safety, debt, iron ore weakness, and near-term volume headwinds.

To see Spark’s full report on RIO stock, click here.

Rio Tinto is a global mining and metals company focused on the exploration, extraction and processing of mineral resources. data.title: Global-E Online Corrects GMV Disclosure in 2025 Annual Report
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Global-e Online ( (GLBE) ) has shared an update.

Global-E Online clarified on March 31, 2026 that its recently filed 2025 annual report contained a scrivener’s error regarding the contribution of existing merchants to GMV. The company stated that existing merchants accounted for 87% and 91% of GMV in 2024 and 2025, respectively, instead of 87% and 87% as previously reported.

Global-E further noted that in 2025 new merchants generated $623 million of GMV out of a total $6.569 billion, confirming that new merchants represented 9% of GMV while existing merchants contributed 91%. The correction underscores the continuing dominance of the existing merchant base in driving the company’s transaction volumes and may reassure investors about the stability and loyalty of its core clientele.

The most recent analyst rating on (GLBE) stock is a Buy with a $43.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Global-e Online stock, see the GLBE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GLBE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GLBE is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong financial quality (low leverage, robust and high-quality free cash flow, and a 2025 profitability inflection) and a very constructive earnings-call outlook with >30% growth guidance and margin expansion. Offsetting these positives are a weak-to-mixed technical picture and a stretched valuation (high P/E with no dividend), which increases sensitivity to execution and macro/tariff-related uncertainty.

To see Spark’s full report on GLBE stock, click here.

More about Global-e Online

Global-E Online Ltd. is an Israel-based e-commerce enablement company that provides cross-border online sales solutions for merchants. The company focuses on helping retailers optimize international transactions and gross merchandise value (GMV) across multiple markets.

Average Trading Volume: 1,595,886

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Farmhouse Delays Filing of Annual 10-K Report
data.description:
Farmhouse ( (FMHS) ) has released a notification of late filing.

End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Farmhouse, Inc. has filed a Form 12b-25 to notify investors that it will delay its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The company is based in San Francisco and the late filing relates specifically to its annual report.

Management cites the need for additional time to complete preparation and review of its financial statements, including related disclosures and audit procedures. The delay is framed as an effort to avoid unreasonable effort or expense in meeting the original deadline.

Farmhouse, Inc. states that it expects to file the Form 10-K (Yearly Report) on or before April 15, 2026, which falls within the 15-day extension window allowed under SEC Rule 12b-25. Investors should therefore anticipate the annual results becoming publicly available within that grace period.

The company does not anticipate any significant change in results of operations compared with the prior fiscal year, according to the notification. No preliminary financial figures are provided, and the statements remain forward-looking until the full audited Form 10-K (Yearly Report) is filed.

Farmhouse, Inc. confirms that all other required periodic reports over the past 12 months have been filed on time, signaling ongoing compliance with SEC reporting rules. The notification is signed by Chief Executive Officer Evan Horowitz on March 31, 2026, underscoring executive responsibility for the delayed filing and the plan to complete it within the allowed extension.

More about Farmhouse

Average Trading Volume: 8,222

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $3.11M

data.title: Patriot Gold Delays Annual 10-K Filing
data.description:
Patriot Gold ( (PGOL) ) has released a notification of late filing.

End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Patriot Gold Corp. has notified regulators that it will be late in filing its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, via a Form 12b-25. The delayed filing relates specifically to its annual Form 10-K (Yearly Report), not to a Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) or Form 20-F (Yearly Report).

The company attributes the delay to the need for additional time, resources, and effort to complete its financial reporting and year-end closing procedures. There is no indication of auditor changes, internal control failures, or special committee reviews noted in the filing.

Patriot Gold states that it expects to submit the Form 10-K (Yearly Report) as soon as possible and in any case no later than the fifteenth calendar day after the original deadline. This timetable aligns with the standard extension period allowed under the SEC’s 12b-25 rules for annual reports.

The company has indicated that it does not anticipate any significant change in its results of operations compared with the prior fiscal year. Investors should remember that any expectations about timing or financial impact are forward-looking statements and could change as the company finalizes its numbers.

Patriot Gold affirms that all other required periodic reports over the past 12 months have been filed, signaling an ongoing effort to stay in compliance despite this delay. The notification is signed by President Trevor Newton on March 31, 2026, formally committing the company to complete the overdue Form 10-K (Yearly Report).

Spark’s Take on PGOL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PGOL is a Neutral.

Patriot Gold’s overall score reflects its financial challenges, including declining profitability and cash flow, despite a strong balance sheet.
